title: Chromagnon
description: Chromagnon is a signal-frontier matrix video instrument: a patchable 14×5 analog matrix, dedicated shape and colorization paths, and deep CV—built for generative and performance video without parking a DAW in the signal chain. Matrix patching, calibrations, and creative workflows live in the Manual. Commerce-facing highlights and the Specs tab keep long tables out of this Overview copy.

seo.title: Chromagnon | LZX Industries
seo.description: Chromagnon: patchable matrix video instrument. Manual, Specs, and hub on lzxindustries.com.
